text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I come across a classroom packed wall
to wall with teachers. Curious, I peek inside...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...to find Gold Ship right in the middle of them!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let me off the hook already! Isn't this long
enough for an apology?

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
After covering your homeroom teacher in chalk
powder?! I think not!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was just testing its flight range! It's not my fault
someone walked in at a bad time!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Seeing as you clearly feel no remorse
for your actions, we'll just have to up the page
count!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This one's on Gold Ship. It takes her a while to
cheer up after that...
